tuning: E A D G B E
content:
#---------------------------------PLEASE NOTE---------------------------------#
#This file is the author's own work and represents their interpretation of the#
#song. You may only use this file for private study, scholarship, or research.#
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#

There are some a cappella parts of the song.  But chords have been
provided regardless.  Please feel free to use or don't use chords
during the a cappella areas of the song.


[Intro]
 
[a capella intro - chords provided anyhow]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    
Nah nah, honey I'm good[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Esus4[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I could have another but I probably should not[/tab]

I've got somebody at home  home   home   home  home


[Verse 1]
 
[tab]            [ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]D/A[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
It's been a long night here, and a long night there[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]D/A[/ch]                [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
And these long, long legs are damn near every - where[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]D/A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Hold up now, you look good, I will not lie[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D/A[/ch]           [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
But if you ask where I'm staying tonight... I gotta be like[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]A/E[/ch]  
Oh baby, no baby, you got me all wrong baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
My baby's already got all my love[/tab]


[Chorus]
 
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    
Nah nah, honey I'm good[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Esus4[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I could have another but I probably should not[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I've got somebody at home, and if I stay I might not leave alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                              [ch]Esus4[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]
No, honey I'm good, I could have another but I probably should not[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                                 [ch]A7[/ch]
I've gotta bid you adieu and to another I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]            [ch]G/D[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) [/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh)[/tab]


[Verse 2]
 
[tab]    [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]D/A[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Now better men than me have failed[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]D/A[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Drinking from that unholy   grail[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]D/A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch] 
Now check it out, I've got her and she got me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]D/A[/ch]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]       
And you've got that ass, that I kind-ly      gotta be like[/tab]


[Bridge]
 
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]  
Oh baby, naw baby, you got me all wrong baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
My baby's already got all my love[/tab]


[Chorus]
 
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]    
So No no, honey I'm good[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Esus4[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I could have another but I probably should not[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]A/E[/ch]
I've got somebody at home, and if I stay I might not leave alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/E[/ch]                                            [ch]Esus4[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
No, honey I'm good, I could have another but I probably should not[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                                 [ch]A7[/ch]
I've gotta bid you adieu and to another I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]            [ch]G/D[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) [/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh)[/tab]


[Bridge]
 
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]  
Oh, I'm sure you, sure you will make somebody's night[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                    
But oh, I assure ya, assure ya it sure as hell's not mine[/tab]


[Chorus A capella]
 
N.C.   
Oh no, honey I'm good
N.C. 
I could have another but I probably should not
N.C. 
I've got somebody at home, and if I stay I might not leave alone

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                              [ch]Esus4[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]
No, honey I'm good, I could have another but I probably should not[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                                 
I've gotta bid you adieu and to another I will stay[/tab]
 

[Chorus]
 
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
So nah nah, honey I'm good[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
I could have another but I probably should not[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I've got somebody at home, and if I stay I might not leave alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                              [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
No, honey I'm good, I could have another but I probably should not[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                    [ch]A[/ch]
I've gotta bid you adieu and to another I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]            [ch]G/D[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh true) I will stay true[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]
(Hoo hoo wooh) I will stay[/tab]


[Outro]
 
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                      [ch]G/A[/ch]                [ch]D7[/ch] 
Singing out oh oh oh oh ohhh oh whoa oh-oh whoa[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]                      [ch]G/D[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch] 
Singing out oh oh oh oh ohhh oh whoa oh-oh whoa[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]                      [ch]G/A[/ch]                [ch]D7[/ch] 
Singing out oh oh oh oh ohhh oh whoa oh-oh whoa[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]                      [ch]G/D[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch] 
Singing out oh oh oh oh ohhh oh whoa oh-oh whoa[/tab]

I will stay true
